# Chris Melson
> Operational Architecture, Systems Design, Post-Merger Integration

## About Me
I am an Operational Architect and Senior Principal Consultant specializing in transforming complex, failing systems into resilient, high-performance engines. I sit at the intersection of business strategy and technical execution—designing systems that scale, integrating merged entities, and leading engineering teams through to the agentic shift.

## Strategic Hubs & Case Studies
- Operational Architecture Case Studies: https://chris.melson.us/guide/operational-architecture/case-studies
- Operational Architecture Articles: https://chris.melson.us/guide/operational-architecture/blog
- Feature Article (Network Observability & AIOps): https://chris.melson.us/guide/operational-architecture/blog/network-observability-platforms
- ITIL Problem Management Guide: https://chris.melson.us/guide/operational-architecture/blog/itil-problem-management

## Architecture Principles
1. **Vertical Sliced Architecture (VSA)**: Backend logic separated strictly by feature boundary to prevent domain pollution.
2. **Feature Sliced Design (FSD)**: Frontend logic layered by discovery (app -> processes -> pages -> widgets -> features -> entities -> shared).
3. **Semantic Twins**: Every major functional feature has a corresponding AI-optimized public guide (AEO/GEO) answering the "What" and "Why" behind the "How".
